title: Dear Tomorrow (EADF2026)
synopsis:
Like fish separated in shop jars, big city dwellers are tightly packed yet utterly isolated. In Tokyo, where 40 percent of residents face social alienation, the government even appointed a "Minister of Loneliness." As thousands seek help daily, the film follows two individuals unknowingly connected through the chat line "A Place for You," chronicling their poignant struggle for meaning. Through luminous imagery, the director tenderly captures the hopeful moment when they finally make the genuine human contact they have been missing.

 

South by Southwest
Visions du Réel
DMZ International Documentary Film Festival

synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
大城市的人就像金魚店中分裝的魚，看似聚在一起，實則被透明玻璃隔絕。在東京，高達四成居民深陷社交疏離，政府甚至要設立「孤獨對策大臣」應對這場致命的隱形瘟疫。本片跟隨兩位在孤獨中苦苦掙扎的人，他們絕望下撥通求助平台「你的容身之所」傾訴不安。面對每日數以千計的個案，求助平台的義工竭力拉緊生命線。導演以細膩的鏡頭，記錄這兩顆孤島般的心靈一邊對抗被社會遺棄的羞恥感，一邊嘗試接納自己，在近乎窒息的現代生活中摸索活下去的微光，重新找到人與人之間的連繫。

 

西南偏南電影節
瑞士真實電影節
韓國DMZ紀錄片電影節
